author: jih2nn
content:
Regarding the [requirement](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/blob/main/src/engine/paris.md?plain=1#L135) in Paris we discussed, the reason we have it is to provide this property: whenever CL requests a payload, EL always respond, even with an empty one. cc <@741651225576996935> 

Thanks for sharing knowledge <@425572898787426305>
